things.name: Kings Park & Botanic Garden
things.description: One of the world's largest city parks with wildflower displays above the Swan River

things.name: Rottnest Island
things.description: Quokka-filled island paradise with car-free beaches, snorkelling and cycling

things.name: Fremantle
things.description: Maritime heritage port city with the Fremantle Prison, markets and craft beer scene

things.name: Cottesloe Beach
things.description: Perth's premier white-sand surf beach with the Indiana Tea House and coral reef

things.name: Swan Valley Wine Region
things.description: Perth's oldest wine region with cellar doors, chocolate factories and cheese farms

things.name: Northbridge
things.description: Cultural precinct with the Art Gallery of WA, WA Museum and Perth's best nightlife

things.name: Pinnacles Desert
things.description: Extraordinary limestone pillars rising from yellow sand in Nambung National Park

things.name: Perth Zoo
things.description: Compact zoo with Australian wildlife, African savannah and orangutans

things.name: Yanchep National Park
things.description: Koalas in the wild, ancient caves and beautiful bushland north of the city

things.name: Elizabeth Quay
things.description: Waterfront precinct on the Swan River with restaurants, art and the Bell Tower
